name: ipgeolocation-io-mcp
description: Official MCP server for IP geolocation, IP security, abuse contacts, ASN, timezone, astronomy, and user-agent parsing.

scripts.build: tsc && printf '%s\n' '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/cli.js > dist/cli.js.tmp && mv dist/cli.js.tmp dist/cli.js && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/client.test.mjs tests/response.test.mjs tests/validation.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/tools.integration.test.mjs tests/mcp.protocol.test.mjs
scripts.test:live: npm run test:live:free && npm run test:live:paid
scripts.test:live:free: npm run build && node tests/live.smoke.mjs free
scripts.test:live:paid: npm run build && node tests/live.smoke.mjs paid

author: ipgeolocation.io
